channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 24th June
item.description:
Cut verge off footway 53mtrs Stop and go TM From ///manicured.shock.talked to Ashley Villa (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 24th June
item.description:
Cut hedge back to boundary of footway 35mtrs Stop and go TM From ///dockers.half.makeup to ///overruns.circle.dugouts (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 24th June
item.description:
Wonky & Faded Give Way Sign - Assess and replace faded give way sign. Replace with like-for-like size.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 24th June
item.description:
3 months Give and take plus temporary footway closure please cut back overgrown tree and ivy growing over lamp column although it is not visible NOTE there are birds nesting in their approx 5 meters high and 1 meter wide as located by customer (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 24th June
item.description:
Faded Give Way Sign - Assess and replace faded give way sign. Replace with like-for-like size.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 24th June
item.description:
Cut verge both sides of entrance 40mtrs Stop and go TM Outside Witcombe Court (Overgrown Hedge)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 24th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 24th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 24th June
item.description:
NWD LANE CLOSURE PLEASE CUT BACK OVERGROWN TREE BRANCH COVERING THE TRAFFIC LIGHT APPROX 3 METERS X3 METERS HIGH (Damaged Tree)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 24th June
item.description:
Fw vegetation Needs clearing and cutting 80 mtrs approx Fw closure (Overgrown Hedge)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 24th June
item.description:
NWD GIVE AND TAKE PLEASE REMOVE X1. 5 METER LONG TREE BRANCH LAYING NEXT TO TREE IN FOOTWAY (Debris/Obstruction in CW)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 24th June
item.description:
Fw overgrown hedge Needs cutting back Approx 100 mtrs Fw closure (Overgrown Hedge)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 24th June
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole 1800x600x40mm plus x15 NSD (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 24th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please repair x1 chipped kerb stone 300x100x40mm with concrete fillet (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds, 24th June
item.description:
There are lots of overgrown weeds along sandstar close that need addressing. These are coming out of cracks in the pavements as well as along the road edges causing issues pedestrians ease of use of the path. Please can this be sprayed asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandstar Close, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor condition, 24th June
item.description:
Particularly along central line.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Hicks Beach Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor condition, 24th June
item.description:
General poor condition of road, especially along central line.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Winterbotham Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 24th June
item.description:
Cw verge Needs cutting back to aid visibility on jnc 10 mtrs length give and take (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 24th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 24th June
item.description:
